creator: timbob@bigpond.com
text:
Thank you for taking the time to submit this patch, but I prefer not
to accept it at this time.

Previous versions of the Isabelle port were more complicated. They
included, for instance, support for XEmacs, whose use is now
discouraged by the upstream developers, and for installation without
Bash, whose features are increasingly used in the upstream
distribution. In the last release, however, I purposely simplified the
port to make it easier to update and to test (especially since the
build times can be long--especially for SML/NJ). I would prefer for
the port to remain simple with settings suitable for most users, even
if that means that they are less ideal for some.

I would suggest that you patch the port locally to meet your
particular needs.

Tim.
